---
title: "Система загрузок"
format: html
---

# Система загрузок

State diagrams и flow diagrams для Download Engine.

## 1. Download Service Lifecycle

```{mermaid}
%%| label: fig-01
%%| fig-cap: "Diagram 1"
stateDiagram-v2
    [*] --> NotStarted
    
    NotStarted --> Starting: startForeground()
    Starting --> Running: Service started
    
    state Running {
        [*] --> Idle
        Idle --> Processing: Download added
        Processing --> Idle: Queue empty
        
        state Processing {
            [*] --> CheckingQueue
            CheckingQueue --> StartingDownload: Has downloads
            StartingDownload --> Downloading: Torrent added
            Downloading --> CheckingQueue: Download complete/failed
        }
    }
    
    Running --> Stopping: All downloads complete
    Stopping --> Stopped: onDestroy()
    Stopped --> [*]
```

## 2. Single Download State Machine

```{mermaid}
%%| label: fig-02
%%| fig-cap: "Diagram 2"
stateDiagram-v2
    [*] --> Queued
    
    Queued --> Checking: Worker started
    Checking --> Downloading: Magnet valid
    Checking --> Failed: Invalid magnet
    
    state Downloading {
        [*] --> Connecting
        Connecting --> FetchingMetadata: Peers found
        Connecting --> Retrying: No peers (attempt < 3)
        
        FetchingMetadata --> Transferring: Metadata received
        
        state Transferring {
            [*] --> Active
            Active --> Active: Progress update
            Active --> Seeding: 100% complete
        }
        
        Transferring --> Paused: Network lost
        Paused --> Transferring: Network restored
    }
    
    Downloading --> Failed: Max retries
    Downloading --> Cancelled: User cancelled
    
    state Downloading {
        Seeding --> Finalizing: Torrent complete
        Finalizing --> [*]: Files verified
    }
    
    Downloading --> Completed: Success
    Completed --> [*]
    Failed --> [*]
    Cancelled --> [*]
```

## 3. Queue Management

```{mermaid}
%%| label: fig-03
%%| fig-cap: "Diagram 3"
stateDiagram-v2
    [*] --> Empty
    
    Empty --> HasItems: Item added
    
    state HasItems {
        [*] --> Checking
        Checking --> BelowLimit: Active < 3
        Checking --> AtLimit: Active >= 3
        
        BelowLimit --> Starting: Start next
        Starting --> BelowLimit: Started
        
        AtLimit --> Waiting: Queue item
        Waiting --> BelowLimit: Download completed
    }
    
    HasItems --> Empty: All items removed
```

## 4. Download Flow Diagram

```{mermaid}
%%| label: fig-04
%%| fig-cap: "Diagram 4"
graph TB
    Start([User clicks magnet link]) --> Intent[ComposeMainActivity<br/>handleMagnetLink]
    
    Intent --> Validate{Valid<br/>magnet?}
    Validate -->|No| Error[Show error]
    Validate -->|Yes| StartService[Start DownloadForegroundService]
    
    StartService --> Queue[DownloadQueueManager<br/>enqueue]
    
    Queue --> CheckLimit{Active<br/>< 3?}
    CheckLimit -->|No| Wait[Add to pending queue]
    CheckLimit -->|Yes| Schedule[Schedule DownloadWorker]
    
    Schedule --> Worker[DownloadWorker<br/>doWork]
    
    Worker --> Torrent[TorrentManager<br/>addTorrent]
    Torrent --> Download[LibTorrent<br/>Download]
    
    Download --> Progress{Progress<br/>Loop}
    Progress --> UpdateNotif[Update Notification]
    Progress --> UpdateDB[Update Room DB]
    Progress --> Complete{100%?}
    
    Complete -->|No| Progress
    Complete -->|Yes| Save[Save to File System]
    
    Save --> Notify[Show completed notification]
    Notify --> AddBook[Add to library]
    AddBook --> End([Success])
    
    Wait -.Active download completed.-> Schedule
    
    Error --> End
    
    style Start fill:#e3f2fd
    style End fill:#c8e6c9
    style Download fill:#fff3e0
```

## 5. WorkManager Integration

```{mermaid}
%%| label: fig-05
%%| fig-cap: "Diagram 5"
stateDiagram-v2
    [*] --> Enqueued
    
    Enqueued --> Running: Constraints met
    Enqueued --> Blocked: Constraints not met
    
    state Running {
        [*] --> Executing
        Executing --> UpdatingProgress: Progress update
        UpdatingProgress --> Executing: Continue
        Executing --> [*]: Work complete
    }
    
    Blocked --> Running: Constraints met
    Blocked --> Cancelled: Timeout/User cancel
    
    Running --> Succeeded: Result.success()
    Running --> Failed: Result.failure()
    Running --> Retry: Result.retry()
    
    Retry --> Enqueued: Backoff delay
    
    Failed --> [*]
    Succeeded --> [*]
    Cancelled --> [*]
    
    state Constraints {
        Network: Wi-Fi preferred
        Battery: > 15%
        Storage: Sufficient space
    }
```

## 6. Torrent Session States

```{mermaid}
%%| label: fig-06
%%| fig-cap: "Diagram 6"
stateDiagram-v2
    [*] --> NotInitialized
    
    NotInitialized --> Initializing: TorrentManager created
    Initializing --> Active: Session started
    
    state Active {
        [*] --> CheckingDHT
        CheckingDHT --> DHTReady: DHT bootstrapped
        
        state DHTReady {
            [*] --> Idle
            Idle --> HasTorrents: Torrent added
            HasTorrents --> Idle: All torrents removed
            
            state HasTorrents {
                [*] --> Downloading
                Downloading --> Seeding: Download complete
                Seeding --> Downloading: New torrent
            }
        }
    }
    
    Active --> Pausing: pauseSession()
    Pausing --> Paused: Session paused
    Paused --> Active: resumeSession()
    
    Active --> Destroying: destroy()
    Paused --> Destroying: destroy()
    Destroying --> [*]
```

## 7. Notification States for Downloads

```{mermaid}
%%| label: fig-07
%%| fig-cap: "Diagram 7"
stateDiagram-v2
    [*] --> NoDownloads
    
    NoDownloads --> ShowingProgress: Download started
    
    state ShowingProgress {
        [*] --> Connecting
        Connecting --> Downloading: Connected
        Downloading --> Downloading: Progress update (every 1s)
        Downloading --> Paused: Paused
        Paused --> Downloading: Resumed
    }
    
    ShowingProgress --> ShowingCompleted: Download finished
    ShowingProgress --> ShowingError: Download failed
    ShowingProgress --> Dismissed: User cancelled
    
    ShowingCompleted --> NoDownloads: Auto-dismiss (5s)
    ShowingError --> NoDownloads: User dismissed
    Dismissed --> NoDownloads
```

## 8. Error Handling Flow

```{mermaid}
%%| label: fig-08
%%| fig-cap: "Diagram 8"
graph TB
    Error[Error Occurred] --> Type{Error Type}
    
    Type -->|Network Error| NetErr[Network Error]
    Type -->|Storage Full| StorageErr[Storage Error]
    Type -->|Invalid Magnet| MagnetErr[Magnet Error]
    Type -->|Torrent Error| TorrentErr[Torrent Error]
    
    NetErr --> CheckRetry{Retry<br/>count < 3?}
    CheckRetry -->|Yes| Wait[Exponential backoff]
    Wait --> Retry[Retry download]
    CheckRetry -->|No| Failed[Mark as FAILED]
    
    StorageErr --> Notify1[Show notification]
    Notify1 --> Cancel[Cancel download]
    
    MagnetErr --> Validate[Invalid magnet URI]
    Validate --> Notify2[Show error notification]
    Notify2 --> Failed
    
    TorrentErr --> CheckRetry
    
    Failed --> UpdateDB[Update status in DB]
    Cancel --> UpdateDB
    Retry --> Resume[Resume download]
    
    style Error fill:#ffcdd2
    style Failed fill:#ef5350
    style Resume fill:#c8e6c9
```

## Component Relationships

### DownloadForegroundService

**Responsibilities:**

- Maintain foreground status podczas active downloads
- Display progress notification
- Coordinate queue manager and workers

**Lifecycle:**

- Created when first download starts
- Stopped when all downloads complete or cancelled

### TorrentManager

**Responsibilities:**
-Wrapper around LibTorrent4j

- Session management (DHT, trackers)
- Progress tracking via AlertListener
- Settings configuration

**Key Methods:**

```kotlin
fun addTorrent(magnetUri: String, savePath: String): String
fun removeTorrent(downloadId: String)
fun pauseTorrent(downloadId: String)
fun resumeTorrent(downloadId: String)
fun getProgress(downloadId: String): DownloadProgress
```

### DownloadQueueManager

**Responsibilities:**

- Limit concurrent downloads (max 3)
- Queue management (FIFO)
- Retry logic
- Persistence in Room

**States:**

- `QUEUED`: Waiting in queue
- `ACTIVE`: Currently downloading
- `PAUSED`: User paused or network lost
- `COMPLETED`: Successfully finished
- `FAILED`: Failed after retries
- `CANCELLED`: User cancelled

### DownloadWorker

**Responsibilities:**

- Background execution via WorkManager
- Constraints checking (network, battery)
- Progress reporting
- Error handling and retry

**Constraints:**

```kotlin
Constraints(
    requiredNetworkType = CONNECTED,
    requiresBatteryNotLow = true,
    requiresStorageNotLow = true
)
```

### DownloadRepository

**Responsibilities:**

- Abstract data access for downloads
- Observe download states via Flow
- WorkManager orchestration

**Interface:**

```kotlin
interface DownloadRepository {
    fun getDownloads(): Flow<List<Download>>
    suspend fun addDownload(download: Download)
    suspend fun cancelDownload(id: String)
    suspend fun pauseDownload(id: String)
    suspend fun resumeDownload(id: String)
}
```
